content.text:
Based on the visualization of the molecule, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom 28 (carbon):

Atom 28 (C:28) is connected to:
- Atom 27 (C:27) - carbon
- Atom 29 (C:29) - carbon
- Atom 33 (H:33) - hydrogen

From the image, I can clearly see that atom 28 (labeled as C:28 in orange) has three bonds: one to atom 27 (C:27), one to atom 29 (C:29), and one to atom 33 (H:33).

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 9072, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_9072.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 28 are:
- Atom 27 (C)
- Atom 29 (C)
- Atom 33 (H)

And the geomconf_index is 9072.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 28, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
